data.description: FRANCE'S LOWER HOUSE BACKS SOCIAL MEDIA BANS FOR UNDER-15S

data.title: The Manitowoc Company, Inc. will announce Q4 2025 and full-year 2025 results on Feb 9, 2026, with a conference call on Feb 10, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Website for webcast: http://ir.manitowoc.com.
data.description: The Manitowoc Company, Inc. (NYSE: MTW) based in Milwaukee is set to unveil its fourth-quarter and full-year results for 2025 on February 9, 2026, post-market closure. Following this, on February 10, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET (9:00 a.m. CT), the company will conduct a conference call to deliberate on the results and future prospects. The call can be accessed through webcast at http://ir.manitowoc.com in the “Events & Presentations” segment.

data.title: Curbline Properties Corp. (NYSE: CURB) to hold Q4 earnings call on Feb 9, 2026 at 8:00AM, releasing results for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Curbline Properties Corp. (NYSE: CURB) disclosed that its financial and operational outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, will be unveiled before market initiation on February 9, 2026. The Company specializes in convenience shopping centers situated on curblines at busy intersections and major vehicular routes in affluent suburban areas. Their quarterly earnings conference call and audio webcast are scheduled for February 9.

data.title: ACV to announce Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 23, 2026. Conference call at 5:00 pm ET. Call dial-in: 877-704-4453.
data.description: A digital automotive marketplace company, ACV (NYSE: ACVA), will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results after market close and conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on Monday, February 23, 2026. To participate in the call, investors and analysts can dial 877-704-4453 (international callers dial 1-201-389-0920) 10 minutes beforehand. This leading company offers data services for dealers and commercial partners.

data.title: Triumph Financial's 4Q 2025 results can be accessed on its website. CEO and CFO will discuss results in a conference call.
data.description: Triumph Financial, Inc. (NYSE: TFIN) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The detailed report and shareholder letter can be accessed on the company's website at ir.triumph.io via the Financial Results link. Aaron P. Graft, Vice Chairman & CEO, and Brad Voss, CFO, will discuss the financial outcomes in a conference call scheduled to start at 9:30 a.m. central time on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. The conference call will include a live video presentation for investors and analysts to review.

data.title: Agilysys reports $80.4M in revenue for Fiscal 2026 Q3, a 15.6% increase from previous year.
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia, Agilysys, Inc. (NASDAQ: AGYS), a prominent hospitality software solutions provider, has disclosed its financial performance for the Fiscal 2026 third quarter which concluded on December 31, 2025. The results indicated that total net revenue saw a notable surge of 15.6%, reaching a record high of $80.4 million in comparison to the $69.6 million reported in the same period a year earlier. Of this revenue, recurring revenue attributed to subscription and maintenance charges was a significant portion.

data.title: Chemung Financial Corp. reported Q4 2025 net income of $7.7 million ($1.61 per share) & $15.1 million income for 2025 ($3.14 per share).
data.description: In Elmira, New York, on January 26, 2026, Chemung Financial Corporation, trading on Nasdaq as CHMG and the parent company of Chemung Canal Trust Company, announced their financial results. For the fourth quarter of 2025, the Corporation reported a net income of $7.7 million, equivalent to $1.61 per share, compared to $7.8 million, or $1.62 per share, in the third quarter of 2025, and $5.9 million, or $1.24 per share, in the fourth quarter of 2024. The annual net income for 2025 was $15.1 million, translating to $3.14 per share. This figure includes a $17.5 million loss due to the sale of securities as part of a balance sheet repositioning. In comparison, the net income for 2024 was $23.7 million, or $4.96 per share.

data.title: Pyxis Tankers (NASDAQ: PXS) updates on loan agreements, share repurchase program, and chartering activity on Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Pyxis Tankers Inc., a global shipping firm listed on the NASDAQ Capital Markets under the ticker symbol PXS, revealed significant developments regarding loans, shareholders, and chartering. The company based in Maroussi, Greece, provided these updates to the public.

data.title: Royce Small-Cap Trust (NYSE: RVT) reported an average trading volume of 1,494,105 shares, closing prices as of 12/31/25 at NAV 17.69 and MKT 16.10. Adviser has over 50 years of experience.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in New York, the oldest and biggest small-cap closed-end fund reported an average weekly trading volume of around 1,494,105 shares. The fund's advisor boasts over 50 years of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. As of December 31, 2025, the closing prices were NAV 17.69 and MKT 16.10.

data.title: WWEX Group awards carriers for excellence; highlights collaboration and reliability in their nationwide network.
data.description: Recognized individuals showcase the teamwork and dependability fueling WWEX Group's domestic carrier system. The company, a top third-party logistics (3PL) provider affiliated with Worldwide Express, GlobalTranz, Unishippers, JEAR Logistics, and BLX Logistics, based in Dallas, unveiled this achievement on Jan 26, 2026, as per PRNewswire.

data.title: New Amped Fitness® gym opens in Columbus on Jan. 26th, offering HVLP experience with Reformer Pilates.
data.description: A new Amped Fitness® location is set to open in Columbus on January 26, 2026, at 4:00 PM. Promising a next-generation, high-value, low-price (HVLP) fitness experience unlike any other in the city, this launch marks a significant expansion for the brand.

data.title: Families in Ohio exploring over 1,080 school options during National School Choice Week to find best K-12 education.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Ohio and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 1,080 schools in Ohio are participating by organizing open houses for parents to explore educational options.

data.title: Royce Global Trust (NYSE: RGT) closed-end fund with 110,157 shares trading weekly, specializing in global equities with a value approach. Adviser has 50+ years of experience.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in New York, a closed-end fund specializing in global equities and following a disciplined value strategy reported an average weekly trading volume of around 110,157 shares. The fund is managed by an adviser with over 50 years of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. Closing prices for the fund were not disclosed in the release.

data.title: C4 Therapeutics granted 85,480 stock options to a new employee on Jan. 26, 2026, as inducement for joining the company.
data.description: In Watertown, Massachusetts, on January 26, 2026, C4 Therapeutics, Inc. (C4T) publicly announced the approval of granting non-qualified stock options by the independent directors serving on the Organization, Leadership and Compensation Committee of the company. The options allow the purchase of 85,480 shares of the company's common stock to a new employee as an Inducement Grant. This grant, made on the same day, was deemed a significant inducement for the individual to join C4T's workforce in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
